prompt: A dice has its faces marked by symbols θ, δ, ω, ε, η and %. Two positions of the same dice are given below. Which face is opposite to face %?
prompt_hi: एक पासे के फलकों को प्रतीक θ, δ, ω, ε, η और % द्वारा चिह्नित किया गया है। एक ही पासे की दो स्थितियाँ नीचे दी गई हैं। कौन सा फलक फलक % के विपरीत है?
reason: If two symbols are common in both dice, then the remaining symbols are opposite to each other. Wait, here only ε is common. Rotating clockwise from ε in dice 1 gives ε -> δ -> θ, and in dice 2 gives ε -> ω -> η. So δ is opposite to ω, and θ is opposite to η. Therefore, the remaining symbol % is opposite to ε.

prompt: A cube is constructed by folding the given sheet along the lines shown. In the cube so formed, what would be the symbol on the opposite side of '#'?
prompt_hi: दी गई शीट को दिखाए गए रेखाओं के साथ मोड़कर एक घन बनाया गया है। इस प्रकार बने घन में, '#' के विपरीत फलक में कौन सा प्रतीक होगा?
reason: By following the alternate surface rule for unfolded nets, in the vertical column, # is opposite to €, and % is opposite to *. The remaining outer symbols @ and ∞ fold to be opposite each other.

prompt: Two different positions of the same dice are given below. Which is the number on the face opposite the face containing 5?
prompt_hi: नीचे एक ही पासे की दो अलग-अलग स्थितियाँ दी गई हैं। 5 दर्शाने वाले फलक के विपरीत फलक पर कौन सी संख्या है?
reason: Number 3 is common and on the same top surface. Thus, the corresponding faces are opposite: 1 is opposite to 4, and 6 is opposite to 2. Therefore, the remaining number 5 is opposite to 3.

prompt: Two different positions of the same dice with faces R, P, T, S, M and B are shown below. Select the letter that will be on the face opposite to the one having S.
prompt_hi: नीचे R, P, T, S, M और B फलकों वाले एक ही पासे की दो अलग-अलग स्थितियाँ दर्शाई गई हैं। उस अक्षर का चयन कीजिए जो S वाले फलक के विपरीत फलक पर होगा।
reason: The letter S is common in both dice and on the same right surface. So, the remaining corresponding faces are opposite: T is opposite to M, and R is opposite to P. Hence, S will be opposite to the remaining letter B.

prompt: Six words Eat, Cry, Play, Sleep, Run and Bath are written on different faces of a dice. Three positions of this dice are shown in the figure. Find the word on the face opposite to Eat.
prompt_hi: एक पासे के अलग-अलग चेहरों पर छह शब्द Eat, Cry, Play, Sleep, Run और Bath लिखे हैं। इस पासे की तीन स्थितियाँ आकृति में दर्शाई गई हैं। Eat के विपरीत चेहरे पर शब्द ढूँढ़िए।
reason: In dice 2 and 3, 'Play' and 'Sleep' are common. Therefore, the remaining surface on each dice will be opposite to each other. So, Run is opposite to Eat.

prompt: Two different positions of the same dice with faces T, O, B, L, Y and V are shown below. Select the letter that will be on the face opposite to the one having L.
prompt_hi: नीचे T, O, B, L, Y और V चेहरों वाले एक ही पासे की दो अलग-अलग स्थितियाँ दिखाई गई हैं। उस अक्षर का चयन करें जो L वाले चेहरे के विपरीत चेहरे पर होगा।
reason: In both dice, Y is common and on the same surface (right). Thus, the corresponding remaining faces are opposite: T is opposite to B, and O is opposite to L.

prompt: Six letters U, V, W, X, Y and Z are written on different faces of a dice. Two positions of this dice are shown in the figure. Find the letter on the face opposite to V.
prompt_hi: एक पासे के अलग-अलग फलकों पर छह अक्षर U, V, W, X, Y और Z लिखे हैं। इस पासे की दो स्थितियाँ चित्र में दर्शाई गई हैं। V के विपरीत फलक पर अक्षर ज्ञात कीजिए।
reason: In both dice, U and X are common faces. When two faces are common, the remaining third faces are opposite to each other. Therefore, Z is opposite to V.

prompt: Six letters J, K, L, M, N and O are written on different faces of a dice. Two positions of this dice are shown in the figure below. Find the letter on the face opposite to J.
prompt_hi: एक पासे के अलग-अलग फलकों पर छह अक्षर J, K, L, M, N और O लिखे हैं। नीचे दिए गए चित्र में इस पासे की दो स्थितियाँ दर्शाई गई हैं। J के विपरीत फलक पर अक्षर ज्ञात कीजिए।
reason: In both dice, O is common and on the same surface (right). Then the remaining corresponding surfaces will be opposite: M is opposite to K, and N is opposite to J.

prompt: Six letters A, B, C, D, E and F are written on different faces of a dice. Three positions of this dice are shown in the figure. Find the letter on the face opposite to A.
prompt_hi: एक पासे के अलग-अलग फलकों पर छह अक्षर A, B, C, D, E और F लिखे हैं। इस पासे की तीन स्थितियाँ चित्र में दर्शाई गई हैं। A के विपरीत फलक पर अक्षर ज्ञात कीजिए।
reason: From Dice 1 and Dice 2, both B and C are common. So, the remaining surface A will be opposite to the remaining surface E.

prompt: Two different positions of the same dice with faces K, B, V, M, P and T are shown below. Select the letter that will be on the face opposite to the one having B.
prompt_hi: K, B, V, M, P और T फलकों वाले एक ही पासे की दो अलग-अलग स्थितियाँ दर्शाई गई हैं। उस अक्षर का चयन करें जो B वाले फलक के विपरीत फलक पर होगा।
reason: In both dice, K is common and on the same top surface. So, corresponding remaining surfaces will be opposite: V is opposite to P, and B is opposite to M.

prompt: Six Roman numbers I, II, III, IV, V and VI are written on different faces of a dice. Two positions of this dice are shown in the figure below. Find the Roman number on the face opposite to 'VI'.
prompt_hi: एक पासे के अलग-अलग फलकों पर छह रोमन अंक I, II, III, IV, V और VI लिखे हुए हैं। नीचे दिए गए चित्र में इस पासे की दो स्थितियाँ दर्शाई गई हैं। 'VI' के विपरीत फलक पर रोमन अंक ज्ञात कीजिए।
reason: In both dice, V and III are common. Therefore, the remaining surface on the first dice (VI) will be opposite to the remaining surface on the second dice (II).

prompt: Six numbers 5, 6, 7, 8, 9 and 10 are written on different faces of a dice. Two positions of this dice are shown in the figure below. Find the number on the face opposite to '7'.
prompt_hi: एक पासे के अलग-अलग फलकों पर छह संख्याएँ 5, 6, 7, 8, 9 और 10 लिखी हैं। नीचे दिए गए चित्र में इस पासे की दो स्थितियाँ दर्शाई गई हैं। '7' के विपरीत फलक पर संख्या ज्ञात कीजिए।
reason: In both dice, numbers 8 and 9 are common. When two faces are common, the remaining surface will be opposite to each other. So, 10 is opposite to 7.

prompt: Six symbols %, &, ?, +, $ and @ are written on different faces of a dice. Two positions of this dice are shown in the figure below. Find the symbol on the face opposite to the one having @.
prompt_hi: एक पासे के विभिन्न फलकों पर छह प्रतीक %, &, ?, +, $ और @ लिखे गए हैं। इस पासे की दो स्थितियाँ नीचे दी गयी आकृति में दिखाई गई हैं। @ वाले फलक के विपरीत फलक पर प्रतीक ज्ञात करें।
reason: The symbol '&' is common in both dice on the same front surface. So, rotating clockwise or comparing positions directly gives: % is opposite to +, and ? is opposite to @.

prompt: Six letters X, T, S, M, R and O are written on different faces of a dice. Two positions of this dice are shown in the figures below. Find the letter on the face opposite to R.
prompt_hi: एक पासे के अलग-अलग फलकों पर छह अक्षर X, T, S, M, R और O लिखे हैं। नीचे दी गई आकृति में इस पासे की दो स्थितियाँ दर्शाई गई हैं। R के विपरीत फलक पर अक्षर ज्ञात कीजिए।
reason: On comparing both dice, we see X is common in both dice and on the same top surface. Moving clockwise gives corresponding opposites: T is opposite to M, and S is opposite to R.

prompt: A cube is constructed by folding the given sheet along the lines shown. In the cube so formed, what would be the word on the opposite side of 'Ball'?
prompt_hi: दी गई शीट को दर्शाई गई रेखाओं के अनुदिश मोड़कर एक घन बनाया गया है। इस प्रकार बने घन में, 'Ball' की विपरीत भुजा पर कौन-सा शब्द होगा?
reason: By visualizing the folded net, the Z-shape alternate property determines opposite pairs: 'Bat' is opposite to 'Stick', and 'Net' is opposite to 'Goal'. The remaining outer flaps 'Ball' and 'Field' are opposite each other.

prompt: Six letters B, F, D, X, N and A are written on different faces of a dice. Two positions of this dice are shown in the figures below. Find the letter on the face opposite to D.
prompt_hi: एक पासे के अलग-अलग चेहरों पर छह अक्षर B, F, D, X, N और A लिखे हैं। इस पासे की दो स्थितियाँ नीचे दी गई आकृतियों में दिखाई गई हैं। D के विपरीत चेहरे पर अक्षर ज्ञात कीजिए।
reason: D is common and on the same right surface in both dice. Therefore, corresponding surfaces are opposite: B is opposite to X, and F is opposite to N. Thus, the letter A is on the face opposite to D.

prompt: Three positions of a dice are given below. What will come on the face opposite to the face containing 'B' on it?
prompt_hi: एक पासे की तीन स्थितियाँ नीचे दी गई हैं। 'B' वाले फलक के विपरीत फलक पर क्या आएगा?
reason: Comparing dice 1 and 2, A and B are common, so D is opposite to E. Comparing dice 2 and 3, A and E are common, meaning B is opposite to F.

prompt: Four different positions of the same dice are given below. Find the letter opposite of c.
prompt_hi: नीचे एक ही पासे की चार अलग-अलग स्थितियाँ दी गई हैं। c के विपरीत अक्षर ज्ञात कीजिए।
reason: In dice (ii) and (iii), d and e are common on both faces. Therefore, the remaining non-common faces must be opposite to each other. So, f will be opposite to c.

prompt: Two positions of a dice are given below. What will come on the face opposite to the face containing '6' on it?
prompt_hi: नीचे एक पासे की दो स्थितियाँ दी गई हैं। 6 वाले फलक के विपरीत फलक पर क्या आएगा?
reason: In both dice, P is common so we can rotate in a clockwise direction starting from P. Dice 1: P -> 2 -> 1. Dice 2: P -> 6 -> $. Hence, 2 will be opposite of 6.

prompt: Six words 'Eat', 'Play', 'Cry', 'Sleep', 'Dance' and 'Run' are written on different faces of a dice. Two positions of this dice are shown in the figure below. Find the word on the face opposite to 'Eat'.
prompt_hi: एक पासे के छह अलग-अलग फलकों पर 'Eat', 'Play', 'Cry', 'Sleep', 'Dance' और 'Run' शब्द लिखे गए हैं। इस पासे की दो स्थितियाँ नीचे दी गई आकृति में दिखाई गई हैं। 'Eat' के विपरीत फलक पर कौन-सा शब्द है?
reason: From both dice, 'Cry' and 'Play' are common. Therefore, the remaining non-common surface will be opposite to each other. So, 'Dance' will be opposite to 'Eat'.

prompt: Six letters M, N, O, P, Q and R are written on different faces of a dice. Two positions of this dice are shown in the figure below. Find the letter on the face opposite to O.
prompt_hi: एक पासे के अलग-अलग फलकों पर छह अक्षर M, N, O, P, Q और R लिखे हैं। नीचे दिए गए चित्र में इस पासे की दो स्थितियाँ दर्शाई गई हैं। O के विपरीत फलक पर अक्षर ज्ञात कीजिए。
reason: From Dice 1 and Dice 2, O is common so we can move in a clockwise direction from O. Dice 1: O -> M -> N. Dice 2: O -> P -> Q. Thus, M is opposite P, and N is opposite Q. The remaining letter R is opposite to O.

prompt: Six letters J, T, E, X, I and O are written on different faces of a dice. Two positions of this dice are shown in the figures below. Find the letter on the face opposite to X.
prompt_hi: एक पासे के अलग-अलग फलकों पर छह अक्षर J, T, E, X, I और O लिखे हैं। नीचे दिए गए चित्र में इस पासे की दो स्थितियाँ दर्शाई गई हैं। X के विपरीत फलक पर अक्षर ज्ञात कीजिए।
reason: As we can see in both dice, J is common and on the same top surface. Therefore, the remaining corresponding surfaces will be opposite to each other: T is opposite to X, and E is opposite to I.

prompt: Six letters J, K, L, M, N and O are written on different faces of a dice. Two positions of this dice are shown in the figure below. Find the letter on the face opposite to N.
prompt_hi: एक पासे के अलग-अलग चेहरों पर छह अक्षर J, K, L, M, N और O लिखे हैं। नीचे दिए गए चित्र में इस पासे की दो स्थितियाँ दर्शाई गई हैं। N के विपरीत चेहरे पर अक्षर ज्ञात कीजिए।
reason: L is common in both dice and at the same front surface. Then the remaining surfaces will be opposite to each other. J is opposite to M, K is opposite to O. The remaining letter N is opposite to L.

prompt: Two different positions of the same dice are given below. Which is the number on the face opposite the face containing 5?
prompt_hi: नीचे एक ही पासे की दो अलग-अलग स्थितियाँ दी गई हैं। 5 वाले फलक के विपरीत फलक पर कौन सी संख्या है?
reason: In both dice, 2 is common and on the same top face. Then the remaining corresponding surfaces will be opposite to each other. Thus, the number 1 is on the face opposite the face containing 5.

prompt: Six numbers 5, 3, 6, 7, 9 and 2 are written on different faces of a dice. Two positions of this dice are shown in the figure below. Find the number on the face opposite to the one having 5.
prompt_hi: एक पासे के अलग-अलग फलकों पर छह संख्याएँ 5, 3, 6, 7, 9 और 2 लिखी हैं। नीचे दी गयी आकृति में इस पासे की दो स्थितियाँ दर्शाई गई हैं। 5 वाले फलक के विपरीत फलक पर संख्या ज्ञात कीजिए।
reason: On comparing both dice we get 3 is common in both dice. So, moving clockwise from 3 gives 3 -> 6 -> 5 in the first dice, and 3 -> 7 -> 2 in the second dice. Thus, the number 2 is on the face opposite to the one having 5.
